description:
DeepCool Control Software


feat:
- ​Add AK620-GEN2 support​
- Expand hardware fingerprinting scope to cover emerging heterogeneous computing units and peripheral devices, ensuring topology parsing integrity.​​
- Fixed pop-up errors on some devices to improve stability.
- Optimized the device temperature monitoring for more accurate warning alerts.
- Significantly reduced the app installation size and storage usage for smoother performance and lower storage consumption.
